metadata.initial_evidence: His last episode was recorded on 26 February and he has remained well since.
metadata.verifier_reason: The note states the patient has been seizure-free for only three weeks (from 26 Feb to 21 Mar), which is less than the 6-month threshold required for "seizure free for N unit". The note does not provide a quantified rate (count over time) for ongoing seizures, nor does it discuss a frequency of seizures other than the current freedom period. Therefore, it lacks usable frequency information for a canonical rate label, making "no seizure frequency reference" the correct canonical label. "unknown" is reserved for when seizures are discussed but frequency cannot be quantified (e.g., "seizures continue but frequency unknown"), whereas here the specific status is "seizure-free for 3 weeks" which is not a frequency reference in the canonical sense of N per unit.
